howItWorks.intro: This gaming electricity cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Monthly Cost
rules.formula: Cost = (Total Watts / 1000) x Hours/Day x 30 x Rate
rules.explanation: Convert watts to kilowatts, multiply by daily hours and monthly days, then by your electricity rate.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much electricity does a gaming PC use?
faq.a: A mid-range gaming PC draws 300-500 watts while gaming. At average US electricity rates, that costs $15-$30 per month for 4 hours daily.

faq.q: Does PSU efficiency matter for electricity cost?
faq.a: Yes, an 80% efficient PSU wastes 20% of power as heat. Upgrading from 80% to 90% efficiency saves roughly 10% on gaming electricity costs.
